title: Star Wars (1977) 26
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|title=''Star Wars'' (1977) 26}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars 26}} {{Youmay|the issue of [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' (1977)]]|the comic strip "[[Doom Mission]]"}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:StarWars1977-26.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'' 26 |writer=[[Archie Goodwin]] |penciller=[[Carmine Infantino]] |inker=[[Bob Wiacek]] |letterer=[[John Costanza]] |colorist=[[Petra Goldberg]] |cover artist=*Carmine Infantino *Bob Wiacek |editor=*Archie Goodwin {{C|Editor}} *[[Jim Shooter]] {{C|Consulting editor}} |publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[May 22]], [[1979]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53816/star_wars_1977_26|text=Star Wars (1977) #26}} {{C|First printing}} |pages=18 |upc=071486028178 |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of the 1977 [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] comic series to the first few months of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], while ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events up until [[Star Wars (1977) 35|issue 35]] to before ''[[Star Wars: Vader's Quest]]'' and ''[[Rebel Force: Trapped]]'', which it dates to two months after the Battle of Yavin. |series=[[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' (1977)]] |issue=26 }} {{Quote|But you'll ''throw away'' the life of the man who destroyed the ''Death Star!''"
"If it can prolong the life of the ''Alliance'', your highness… yes!|Leia Organa and Jan Dodonna, in ''Star Wars 26''|[[Star Wars (1977) 26|''Star Wars'' (1977) 26]]}} '''''Star Wars 26''''' is the twenty-sixth issue of the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Archie Goodwin]], illustrated by [[Carmine Infantino]], and first published on [[May 22]], [[1979]] by [[Marvel Comics]]. The issue features the story "'''Doom Mission!'''," in which [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] investigates the appearance of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] raiders in [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] territory. ==Publisher's summary== ''The Empire has something devious set up on Yavin and Luke and Leia are on a mission to uncover just what is going on.'' ==Plot summary== The Empire has set up a [[Yavin blockade|blockade]] of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] [[Sector/Legends|Sector]] and Luke and Leia, on their way back to the [[Great Temple/Legends|Rebel base]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], are ambushed by two Imperial [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. Just as the situation appears hopeless, a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] patrol arrives and destroys the two enemy [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]]. Once they finally arrive at the base, they inform [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] about the events they observed earlier, where TIE fighters were entering the gaseous [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] of Yavin. Since Yavin's atmosphere is too thick for conventional signalling, they deduce that the [[House of Tagge/Legends|House of Tagge]] and the Empire have developed some new signalling technology and set up a launch station within the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]. Luke goes on a mission to retrieve one of the signalling units from a downed TIE fighter, but at the cost of critical damage to [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. Luke then [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] a captured TIE fighter, fitted with the new signalling unit, through the atmosphere of Yavin to the [[Achtnak Turbine Station]]. He destroys the station without trouble, but must find his way back to open [[Realspace/Legends|space]] without the benefit of guidance from the station. Using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to direct him, Luke manages to find his way out of the thick atmosphere. Little does he know that [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Orman Tagge/Legends|Orman Tagge]] followed him out, saving himself from being lost on Yavin forever. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars (1977) 26}} ===Editions=== *UPC 071486028178; [[May 22]], [[1979]]; [[Marvel Comics]]; First printing *{{C|No UPC}}; [[October 6]], [[2015]]; Marvel Comics; Digital edition{{Marvel|subdomain=comicstore|url=Star-Wars-1977-1986-26/digital-comic/37222|text=Star Wars (1977-1986) #26}} {{C|Digital edition}} ===Cover gallery=== File:StarWars1977-26.jpg|First printing {{C|Newsstand}} File:Mswc26cover.jpg|First printing {{C|Direct}} File:StarWars1977-26-Digital.jpg|Digital edition ===Collected in=== *[[Star Wars Weekly 55|''Star Wars Weekly'' 55]] & [[Star Wars Weekly 56|56]] *[[Return of the Jedi Weekly 48|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 48]] - [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 50|50]] *''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 2: Dark Encounters]]'' *''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago....
